creator: jorhett@bitchandwine.net
text:
Eygene, may I ask why you want FreeBSD to patch something against the  
wishes of the code maintainer? cfengine 2.x requires BDB 4.4 or greater.

And this change would not be FreeBSD specific, so should probably be  
taken up with Mark instead.

--
Jo Rhett
Bitch and Wine.net - nothing like cool glass of wine and a warm dog
